title: jasminum elatum
intro: Jasminum elatum, also known as the star jasmine or night-blooming jasmine, is a flowering plant that belongs to the olive family (Oleaceae) and is native to southern Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries, and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, making it useful for treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Jasminum elatum include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, promote relaxation, and improve sleep quality, due to its calming effects. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is often used in aromatherapy to promote a sense of well-being and tranquility.
